common.loadError: Couldn't load {{thing}} — is the API running on :3001?

radar.title: Job Radar
radar.subtitle: Fresh roles from every source you track — deduplicated, normalized, scored.
radar.manageSourcesTooltip: Source management arrives in a later phase
radar.emptyBlurbFiltered: Try a different source, clear the search, or run a fresh crawl.
radar.emptyBlurb: Run your first crawl to pull jobs from RemoteOK, WeWorkRemotely, HN Who’s Hiring, and ITviec.

insights.title: Market Insights
insights.subtitle: What the market actually demands, extracted from every job description we crawl.
insights.emptyTitle: No data in this window yet
insights.emptyBlurb: Run a crawl from the Job Radar, then come back — insights need extracted skills to chart anything.
insights.skillDemandHint: Share of jobs in this window mentioning each skill. Accent bars are in your profile; outlined bars are gaps.
insights.noSkillsInCategory: No skills in this category yet.
insights.trendHint: Weekly mentions over the last 90 days.
insights.pickSkillsHint: Pick up to 3 skills above to chart their trend.
insights.yourGapHint: Skills the market wants most that aren't in your profile yet.
insights.noGap: No gap — your profile covers current demand.

roadmap.title: Prep Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: A weekly study plan across DSA, system design, cloud infra, and web fundamentals.
roadmap.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate the roadmap? In-progress and done topics are kept exactly as-is — only unstarted (todo) topics are replaced.
roadmap.emptyBlurb: Waypoint compares market demand against your profile and packs a 6-week plan across all four tracks. Scores get sharper as more jobs are crawled — but the DSA ladder and track fundamentals work fine even with an empty Job Radar.
roadmap.statusTodo: Not started — click to mark in progress
roadmap.statusInProgress: In progress — click to mark done

review.title: Daily Review
review.subtitle: Spaced repetition for interview questions — a short queue, every day.
review.allCaughtUpBlurb: Nothing is due right now. New cards unlock as your roadmap progresses, and reviewed cards come back on their next SM-2 interval.
review.capReachedBlurb_one: {{count}} card still due, but the daily new-card cap (10/day) has been reached — the rest unlock tomorrow, or as in-progress cards come due on their own schedule.
review.capReachedBlurb_other: {{count}} cards still due, but the daily new-card cap (10/day) has been reached — the rest unlock tomorrow, or as in-progress cards come due on their own schedule.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your skills and preferences, used to score and match jobs.
profile.skillsHint: Click to add or remove — used to compute match scores.
profile.studyHoursHint: Used to pace the Phase 3 prep roadmap into weekly chunks.
profile.locationsHint: Comma-separated (e.g. Ho Chi Minh City, Remote).

tracker.title: Applications
tracker.subtitle: Every application in one pipeline — saved, applied, interviewing, offer.
tracker.emptyBoardBlurb: Track a job from the Job Radar, or add one manually.
